heading: Powers
label: 70306 Powers
text: The corporation has only the powers provided in its bylaws and articles of incorporation filed in each State in which it is incorporated.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7030636:2202., , .Jan. 8, 1983Pub. L. 97–427, § 296 Stat. 2265The words “and subject to the laws of such State of States” are omitted as unnecessary.
